module.name: ibm-roks-flo
module.description: Deploy F5 Lifecycle Operator and related BNK prerequisites on IBM ROKS.

required.reason: FLO creates cert-manager resources and needs cert-manager CRDs present.
FLO must target the IBM ROKS cluster created or attached by the cluster module.

required.name: f5_bigip_k8s_manifest_version
required.description: F5 BIG-IP Next for Kubernetes manifest version.

required.name: ibmcloud_api_key
required.description: IBM Cloud API key used for COS and IAM operations.

required.name: openshift_cluster_name
required.description: OpenShift cluster name used for trusted profile naming and integration.

required.name: openshift_cluster_crn
required.description: OpenShift cluster CRN used for IAM trusted profile binding.

required.name: cluster_vpc_id
required.description: Cluster VPC ID used for trusted profile IAM scope.

optional.name: enabled
optional.description: Enable FLO deployment.

optional.name: cert_manager_crd_ready
optional.description: Dependency token proving cert-manager CRDs are ready.

optional.name: far_repo_url
optional.description: F5 Artifact Repository hostname.

optional.name: cert_manager_namespace
optional.description: Namespace where cert-manager is installed.

optional.name: manifest_download_dir
optional.description: Temporary directory for F5 manifest extraction.

optional.name: bigip_username
optional.description: BIG-IP username for CIS integration.

optional.name: bigip_password
optional.description: BIG-IP password for CIS integration.

optional.name: bigip_url
optional.description: BIG-IP URL for CIS integration.

optional.name: flo_namespace
optional.description: Namespace where FLO will be installed.

optional.name: utils_namespace
optional.description: Namespace for shared F5 utility components.

optional.name: jwt_token
optional.description: JWT token used when COS-backed license retrieval is disabled.

optional.name: cluster_issuer_name
optional.description: Cluster issuer name created or referenced by FLO.

optional.name: nad_cni_type
optional.description: CNI type used for the network attachment definition.

optional.name: nad_interface_name
optional.description: Host interface name for the network attachment definition.

optional.name: nad_ipvlan_mode
optional.description: IPVLAN mode for the network attachment definition.

optional.name: nad_ipvlan_address
optional.description: Static address used for the IPVLAN network attachment definition.

optional.name: use_cos_bucket
optional.description: Fetch FAR auth and JWT artifacts from IBM COS.

optional.name: ibmcloud_cos_bucket_region
optional.description: IBM COS bucket region for FAR and JWT artifacts.

optional.name: ibmcloud_resource_group
optional.description: IBM Cloud resource group used for COS lookup.

optional.name: ibmcloud_cos_instance_name
optional.description: IBM COS instance name used for artifact retrieval.

optional.name: ibmcloud_resources_cos_bucket
optional.description: IBM COS bucket containing FAR auth and JWT artifacts.

optional.name: f5_cne_far_auth_file
optional.description: FAR auth archive filename stored in IBM COS.

optional.name: f5_cne_subscription_jwt_file
optional.description: Subscription JWT filename stored in IBM COS.

key_outputs.name: trusted_profile_id
key_outputs.description: IBM IAM trusted profile ID created for the CNE controller.

key_outputs.name: cluster_issuer_name
key_outputs.description: Cluster issuer name exposed to downstream modules.

key_outputs.name: cneinstance_network_attachments
key_outputs.description: Network attachment definitions passed to the CNEInstance module.

key_outputs.name: cos_jwt_token
key_outputs.description: JWT token fetched from IBM COS when COS integration is enabled.

required.name: ibmcloud_api_key
required.description: IBM Cloud project or credential-template secret providing the API key.
